channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Maltina Nourishment Tour Hits Tomike Adeoye’s School, Celebrates 50 Years of Feeding Young Nigerians
item.description: Maltina don continue to dey spread their nationwide Nourishment Tour, and dem don reach Maverick College, the school wey Brand Ambassador Tomike Adeoye attend. On May 4th, 2026, Maltina and Tomike bri...

item.title: Real-time Updates on the 48th ASEAN Summit Held in Cebu
item.description: The 48th ASEAN Summit took place on May 7, 2026, in Cebu, Philippines, bringing together leaders from Southeast Asian nations to discuss regional cooperation, economic development, and political colla...

item.title: West Bengal Assembly dissolved by Governor after Mamata Banerjee refuses resignation
item.description: In a significant political development in West Bengal, the Governor has dissolved the state assembly following Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee's refusal to step down despite the election results. This ...

item.title: The Role of Urban Trees in Reducing City Heat and Inequality
item.description: Cities tend to be significantly hotter than surrounding rural areas due to the heat retention of asphalt, concrete, and brick, a phenomenon known as the urban heat island effect. This can pose serious...

item.title: Episode 24 Recap: The Challenges and Conflicts in Lara’s Life
item.description: In Episode 24 of 'Blood vs Duty', viewers continue to follow the intricate and challenging journey of Lara. The series, produced by ABS-CBN Studios, highlights the personal struggles and emotional con...

item.title: Federal government sees notable uptake in early retirement program among public servants
item.description: A recent report highlights the number of federal public servants who have applied for early retirement packages as part of government workforce management efforts. The initiative is designed to reduce...

item.title: GDPR Challenge Questions LinkedIn’s Control Over Profile Visitor Data
item.description: A legal dispute in the European Union is challenging LinkedIn’s handling of user data under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). The case, supported by privacy advocacy group Noyb, argues th...

item.title: Joe McCann Faces Online Threats Following Ashlee Jenae’s Death in Zanzibar
item.description: Joe McCann, the fiancé of late influencer Ashlee Jenae, has opened up after her tragic passing in Zanzibar. Ashlee, aged 31, died shortly after celebrating her birthday with Joe. Following her death, ...

item.title: Fadiel Adams remanded in custody as court delays bail over alleged witness interference
item.description: National Coloured Congress (NCC) leader and Member of Parliament Fadiel Adams will remain in custody until next week after the Pinetown Magistrate’s Court postponed his bail application. Adams appeare...

item.title: Delhi Capitals and Kolkata Knight Riders face crucial IPL clash to keep playoff hopes alive
item.description: Delhi Capitals (DC) and Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) are set to face each other in a crucial IPL 2026 encounter at the Arun Jaitley Stadium, with both teams fighting to stay alive in the playoff race. ...

item.title: Two men killed in Newport crash; three arrested on suspicion of murder and aiding offender
item.description: Two men, believed to be the rider and passenger of a motorbike, tragically lost their lives following a collision with a BMW in Newport early on Thursday morning. The car reportedly fled the scene on ...

item.title: Sir David Attenborough expresses gratitude for birthday messages ahead of his 100th
item.description: Sir David Attenborough, the renowned broadcaster and natural historian, has expressed that he is 'completely overwhelmed' by the flood of birthday greetings he has received ahead of his 100th birthday...

item.title: Andhra Pradesh panel directs clearance of encroachments on Dalit properties and graveyards
item.description: In Andhra Pradesh, the State Commission for Scheduled Castes has taken significant action to protect Dalit communities from illegal encroachments. On May 7, 2026, member Ravada Seetharam instructed th...

item.title: Ian Veneracion praises Bea Alonzo's qualities as wife and mother
item.description: In a recent interview, veteran actor Ian Veneracion shared his admiration for fellow actress Bea Alonzo, expressing that he believes she would be an exceptional wife and mother. Veneracion's remarks c...

item.title: Tamil Nadu requests UPSC to defer DGP empanelment meeting due to state administrative needs
item.description: The appointment of a regular Director General of Police (DGP) in Tamil Nadu is likely to face further delay. The State government has formally written to the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) req...

item.title: Yellow-bellied marmot spotted for the first time at UNBC campus in Prince George
item.description: A yellow-bellied marmot, typically found in southern British Columbia and the western United States, has been observed living on the University of Northern British Columbia's campus in Prince George. ...

item.title: Advances in Early Diabetes Detection and Risk Assessment
item.description: Traditional diabetes diagnosis relies heavily on blood sugar measurements, such as the HbA1c test, but these methods often fail to identify people at risk early enough. Globally, diabetes affects mill...

item.title: Goodluck Jonathan Urges Nigerian Youths To Get PVCs Before Pressing Him To Run
item.description: Former President Goodluck Jonathan don yarn Nigerian youths say make dem dey involved for country election palava. E tok this one on Thursday when plenty youths jam him house dey beg am make e run for...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Resumes Hearings into Criminal Justice Allegations
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry, tasked with investigating claims of criminality, political interference, and corruption within South Africa's criminal justice system, continued its proceedings in ...

item.title: University Student Passes Away Before Graduation, Parents Receive Degree on His Behalf
item.description: It was a deeply emotional day for the Nxele family as they attended the graduation ceremony of their late son, Siyanda Nxele, who passed away earlier in the year after a short illness. Siyanda had bee...
